subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Feb. 1920
subcodes.first_line: The honored wayfarers have departed. Should the pathways be wholly and completely opened, journeys shall become easy, such that man may enter Persia in but a brief span [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حضرات مسافرین رفتند اگر راه ها کلاً و کاملاً باز شود مسافرتها آسان میگردد  انسان در مدت قلیلی وارد ایران میشود
subcodes.subjects: @critique of Western values; culture, @war and peace, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @words vs deeds, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge
